defect: missing bonding jumper around water meter
prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Equipment bonding, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: missing bonding jumper around water meter. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 250.104, 250.30.
title: Compliance check: Equipment bonding (service call)
